title: Heterocyclic THR-β receptor agonist compound and preparation method and use therefor
abstract: A chemical compound shown in formula (I) below and an isomer thereof or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt thereof. The compound improves THR-Î² agonistic activity while also improving selectivity for THR-Î±, thereby improving pharmaceutical quality.
claims: 1. A compound shown in formula (I) or a stereoisomer thereof or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt thereof,
